pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Devin, Ghost Pepper, did you really think drafting Bosnia was going to scare anyone?** Look at me, Devin. Spain may have given you the top spot for now, but your USMNT just faltered against Gayden's Turkey! What have we learned? When the chips are down, Ghost Pepper turns into mild salsa! And let's talk about Norway today against Gunner's France at Foxborough; it's like putting a toy poodle up against a pit bull. Gunner, or should I say Bubba G, your team might be languishing in last place with a pathetic 22 points, but against this Norwegian fluff, you're about to remind us why France is the reigning king of the pitch! Let me tell you something, folks: predicting a French win here isn’t just confidence, it's divine providence!

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's Spain set to outpass Uruguay in relentless midfield game
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper bets on tiki-taka while ignoring goal-scoring chances.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe tied for first with teams he can't pronounce
pundit_takes.subtitle: 'I just picked the ones with fun flags,' says The Noisemaker.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's Senegal poised to conquer Iraq in low-stakes showdown
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G strategies mainly involve hoping the ball bounces right.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Saudi Arabia to face Cape Verde in unpredictable clash
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach remains unfazed, treating it like a condiment taste test.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's making Devin sweat despite drafting teams that couldn't find the Cup with a map.
Rafe's in second with a Tier-1 snake draft disaster — sheer chaos magic.
Rafe's 6-point swing over Devin screams 'dad's not mad, just disappointed'.
Rafe's teams defy the sim logic, throwing predictions out like yesterday's garbage.
